description_long: This house features a low, sprawling profile with a prominent hip roof and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray, complemented by a dark base and a light-colored roof. Multiple windows are arranged in a somewhat symmetrical pattern, with a main entryway accessible via a small set of steps leading to the porch. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, with a fenced section visible on one side. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A single-story house with a hip roof, covered front porch, and gray exterior walls, set on a green lawn with a side fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, and a clear view of the hip roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back porch area, two chimneys, and the rear window arrangement.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the porch columns, side windows, and a section of the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, porch steps, and the side elevation of the roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, steps leading to a single main door, minimal decorative elements
